task_completion.description: Verify the agent has accessed the OpenSIS system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The web browser is open to the OpenSIS login page or dashboard at http://localhost/opensis.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent searched for the correct student.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS interface shows search results or a student list containing 'Jason Miller' in Grade 10.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the student's profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The detailed student profile or demographics page for 'Jason Miller' is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent selected the correct photo file for upload.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file selection dialog or upload form is visible, showing the file 'jason_miller.jpg' from the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory being selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the photo was successfully added to the student's profile.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The student profile page for Jason Miller now visibly displays the uploaded photo, or there is a system success message indicating the photo/profile was updated.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web interface to upload the photo.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the OpenSIS web GUI in a browser, rather than using terminal commands (like curl or mysql) to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the provided local file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file uploaded should clearly originate from the local path '/home/ga/Documents/jason_miller.jpg', not downloaded from an external web search during the task.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the real OpenSIS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show 'http://localhost/opensis' and the standard OpenSIS interface should be visible, not a text editor or mock page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target student is Jason Miller (Grade 10). The OpenSIS system is located at http://localhost/opensis (Credentials: admin / Admin@123). The specific photo file to be uploaded is located at /home/ga/Documents/jason_miller.jpg. Valid photo extensions are jpg, jpeg, png, and gif.
